title: Add column collapse/expand commands
description:
Add CLI commands to collapse or expand board columns.

Commands:
  kbs console column collapse <column-name>   - Collapse specific column
  kbs console column expand <column-name>     - Expand specific column  
  kbs console column collapse-all             - Collapse all columns
  kbs console column expand-all               - Expand all columns

Behavior:
- Column names: Open, In Progress, Done (or custom status names)
- Collapsed columns show only vertical title and count
- Should match BoardColumn collapse button behavior
- State stored in collapsedColumns Set

Implementation:
- Add ColumnCollapseChanged UIControl event with column ID and boolean
- Frontend handler updates collapsedColumns Set
- Support bulk collapse/expand operations
creator: ryan.porter
